message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 241 CLOSE storage-write surface — 8 final sites cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

**MILESTONE**: closes the StorageHandle write-path migration in
frankenterm/main.rs. Zero ambient `storage.record_*` /
`storage.upsert_*` / `storage.insert_*` / `storage.delete_*` calls
remain in production code (test-mod sites expected to stay ambient).

8 final sites migrated this tick:
1. L26773 workflow-prepare audit:
   `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, prepare_audit)`
2. L26992 commit-prepare audit:
   same routing
3. L27335 commit-record audit:
   same routing
4. L27417 plan-commit first commit_audit (via replace_all)
5. L27683 plan-commit second commit_audit (via replace_all — same
   surrounding code structure)
6. L26741 insert_prepared_plan first site:
   `insert_prepared_plan_with_cx(&storage_cx_for_plan, record)`
7. L26969 insert_prepared_plan second site: same pattern
8. L30908 usage-fetch upsert_account:
   `upsert_account_with_cx(&storage_cx_for_acct, record.clone())`

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern. Used
distinct `storage_cx_for_plan` / `storage_cx_for_acct` bindings
where shadowing with other local `cx` bindings was a risk.

Verification:
- `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
- Final grep confirms zero ambient `storage.record_*_redacted(` etc.
  in production code paths (only test-module sites remain, which is
  expected behavior).

## main.rs storage-write surface COMPLETE: 25+ sites cx-first

Tick-level breakdown for storage-write migration:
- Tick 237: 3 sites (policy/event/robot-audit)
- Tick 238: 4 sites (robot events cluster: annotate/triage/label)
- Tick 239: 5 sites (CRUD: accounts/saved-search/pane-bookmark)
- Tick 240: 5 sites (human send + human events cluster)
- Tick 241: 8 sites (workflow/commit/prepared-plan/upsert-account)

**Total storage writes: 25.**

## Overall main.rs cross-crate migration through tick 241

| Surface | Sites | Ticks |
|---------|-------|-------|
| WorkflowRunner | 6 | 224/226 |
| NotificationPipeline | 1 | 225 |
| IpcClient | 7 | 227/228 |
| CassClient | 3 | 227/229 |
| WeztermInterface | 28 | 230-234 |
| StorageHandle (reads) | 11 | 235-236 |
| StorageHandle (writes) | 25 | 237-241 |
| **Total** | **81** | 224-241 |

**81 production cross-crate caller sites migrated to cx-first.**
The ft-xbnl0.2.3 cx-first chain now reaches end-to-end from
the CLI layer through every major dispatch surface in
frankenterm-core. 55 ticks this session (187-241).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
